signal_title: European Commission's Guidelines on the Protection of Minors under the Digital Services Act (DSA)
risk_rationale: The regulatory guidance from the European Commission under the DSA introduces new requirements for the protection of minors that are not fully aligned with TikTok's current internal baseline, particularly in the areas of age verification and content moderation enhancements.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Accounts for ages 13-17 are private by default
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Set minors' accounts to private by default
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline aligns with the regulatory requirement for setting accounts to private by default for minors.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok states it uses machine learning and safety review to identify likely under-13 users and remove/limit access
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline relies on machine learning and safety reviews, which may not meet the regulatory requirement for effective age verification methods.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Community Guidelines include regulated goods/services and expanded account/feature governance
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Enhance content moderation and reporting tools
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline does not explicitly mention enhancements to content moderation and reporting tools as required by the new guidelines.

remediations.title: Implement Enhanced Age Verification
remediations.description: Develop and integrate an enhanced age verification system that goes beyond machine learning to meet regulatory expectations.

remediations.title: Enhance Content Moderation Tools
remediations.description: Upgrade content moderation and reporting tools to align with the new regulatory guidelines, ensuring effective protection of minors.

business_impact: Failure to comply with the new guidelines could result in regulatory scrutiny and potential fines, impacting TikTok's operations in the EU market.
recommended_actions: Conduct a detailed review of current age verification methods
Initiate development of enhanced content moderation tools
Engage with regulatory bodies to ensure compliance with guidelines
